title: October 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 24''' is the 297th day of the year (298th in leap years), with 68 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Jack Angel]] is born.
*[[1930s#1936|1936]] – [[Dinah L. Moché]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Françoise Mouly]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Tom Angleberger]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Amy Allen]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 19|''Star Wars'' (1977) 19]] published. The cover date is January.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 87|''Star Wars Weekly'' 87]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Katerina Belikova]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Empire's End 1|''Empire's End'' 1]] published.
*1995 – [[River of Chaos 4|''River of Chaos'' 4]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 35|''Star Wars'' (1998) 35]] published.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' released.
*[[2006]] – [[Bronte Carmichael]] is born.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 21|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 21]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 9: Boba Fett: Death, Lies, and Treachery]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Rookies (episode)|Rookies]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'': [[The Clone Wars: Season Two|Season 2]] began in the UK.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars: Agent of the Empire Volume 1—Iron Eclipse|''Star Wars: Agent of the Empire—Iron Eclipse'']] published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume Five—Out of the Wilderness]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 10: War]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars: Stormtroopers: Beyond the Armor]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle 4|''Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle'' 4]] published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 25|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 25]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2023 – ''[[I, Jedi]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2023 – ''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2023 – ''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*[[2025]] – "[[BB-8 and R2-D2 Go Undercover!]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
